title: seleno's optimizations
description: Seleno's Optimizations is just another optimization modpack created for maximum FPS.
body:
**seleno's optimizations** is a modpack created to fix lag and patches exploits. It also adds some QOL mods. This modpack is **only updated** to update to a new version or patch exploits. Sometimes, mods are replaced.

**Using Fabric with no mods (besides FPS display):** 
![304 FPS](https://i.imgur.com/71oqm3V.png)
**Using SO:**
![Fps: 978](https://i.imgur.com/vT8OMHv.png)
*FPS may change depending on your system specs, if you use an integrated GPU, you may have issues.*
*The benchmark was conducted on a Nvidia RTX 3060 TI GPU and AMD Ryzen 5700G
